definition: Contemplation that attends to the unsatisfactory side of conditioned experience.
notes: Use this record for the active contemplative side of the dukkha mark. It should keep the repository's dissatisfaction default audible and should not drift into generalized suffering-language. In the three-marks sequence it belongs between impermanence and not-self rather than standing alone as a mood label.

example_phrases.notes: Canonical contemplative designation governing the practice family.
